response.overview: A childless woman begs Allah to send her a being, and if it is a pumpkin. When he hears her, she tends the little pumpkin and lets him go to school. There the son of the Shah sees him and finds his lively activity fallen. He follows the pumpkin and discovers in his interior a beautiful girl he falls in love with. A lot of obstacles still need to be removed until the wedding.
response.title: Das Kürbiskind
